title: Research Radar — Mon May 11: Focus on AI Platforms and LLM Integration Grows
headline: Focus on AI Platforms and LLM Integration Grows
summary_text: Today's research highlights a surge in open-source AI platforms and frameworks designed for integrating large language models (LLMs) into applications. Projects like 'mlflow/mlflow' and 'sgl-project/sglang' exemplify the trend towards enhanced observability and performance in AI systems.
